channel.title: dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the dead-code-hunter codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The entry point and execution orchestration layer for the GitHub Action environment. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: Reporting Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Processes and transforms raw analysis data into human-readable Markdown for PR feedback. Architectural overview of the Reporting domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.

item.title: SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Integration layer for interacting with the Supermodel dead code analysis API. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Testing Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The test suite and infrastructure for ensuring reliability of filtering and formatting logic. Architectural overview of the Testing domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.description: Generates the visual structure of the GitHub PR comment Architecture documentation for the MarkdownTemplates subdomain (part of Reporting domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
